column1: # SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2026 OpenBasil Contributors
# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
# Compose Phase 1 retained-evidence artifact inventory (schema_version 1).
# Consumed only by scripts/compose-phase1-artifacts.sh. Tab-separated; lines
# beginning with '#' and blank lines are ignored. Every row needs a non-empty
# note. The 'status' column is either 'ready' (fully pinned and acquirable) or
# 'not-yet-populated' (intentionally reserved; see below).
# Kinds and how each is verified:
#   file-openpgp-clearsigned / file-openpgp-detached
#       A downloadable file. The sha256 column pins the file; the checksum and
#       signature columns pin an OpenPGP-signed upstream checksum manifest that
#       is verified against the checked-in key (key_file / signer_fingerprint)
#       under interop-tests/compose-phase1/keys/. Trust flows from the pinned
#       signer, never from the mirror hostname.
#   oci-image
#       A digest-pinned multi-arch container image. The sha256 column holds the
#       manifest-list (OCI image index) digest in lowercase hex WITHOUT the
#       'sha256:' prefix; this digest is the SOLE trust anchor. The source
#       column holds the tag-qualified reference registry/repo:tag used only to
#       resolve that digest. filename is the on-disk OCI-layout directory name;
#       size and every checksum/signature/key column are '-'. Acquisition is
#       'skopeo copy --all' by digest into an OCI layout, re-verified offline:
#       the pinned blob and every other blob must self-address, and index.json
#       must reference the pinned digest. The full multi-arch index is retained
#       so the arm64 lane can select its platform. Digests below were resolved
#       with 'skopeo inspect --raw <ref> | sha256sum' (skopeo 1.23.0) on
#       2026-07-14; each index carries linux/amd64 and linux/arm64.
#   package-set
#       A set of distribution packages (NEVRAs / versions plus signed repo or
#       package hashes) installed inside a guest. Populated later by the lane
#       provisioning issues, NOT here:
#         fedora-44-runtime-packages-x86_64  -> basil-3kx (Fedora Podman/Compose)
#         ubuntu-24.04-docker-packages-x86_64 -> basil-y0f (Ubuntu Docker/Compose)
#       These rows stay 'not-yet-populated' by design. While ANY row is
#       unpopulated, fetch-all / verify-all / offline finalize honestly with
#       exit 3 instead of claiming completeness; per-artifact fetch/verify of the
#       populated rows still succeed.
schema_version

column18: Fedora 44 Cloud Base Generic release 1.7; exact signed checksum verified with the Fedora 44 release key.
Ubuntu 24.04 LTS amd64 dated release 20260705; exact detached signature and checksum verified.
Ubuntu 24.04 LTS arm64 dated release 20260705; exact detached signature and checksum verified for the functional TCG lane.
Exact Podman and Compose package NEVRAs plus signed repository metadata hashes are populated later by lane issue basil-3kx, not here.
Exact Docker Engine and Compose package versions plus package hashes are populated later by lane issue basil-y0f, not here.
Official Fedora 44 workload image. Manifest-list digest resolved with skopeo inspect --raw (skopeo 1.23.0) on 2026-07-14; index covers linux/amd64,arm64,ppc64le,s390x.
Official Alpine 3.22 workload image. Manifest-list digest resolved with skopeo inspect --raw (skopeo 1.23.0) on 2026-07-14; index covers linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 among eight platforms.
Official Debian 13 (trixie) workload image. Manifest-list digest resolved with skopeo inspect --raw (skopeo 1.23.0) on 2026-07-14; index covers linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 among eight platforms.
Official Ubuntu 24.04 LTS workload image. Manifest-list digest resolved with skopeo inspect --raw (skopeo 1.23.0) on 2026-07-14; index covers linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 among six platforms.

Official PostgreSQL 18 workload image for the unmodified-image acceptance case. Manifest-list digest resolved with skopeo inspect --raw (skopeo 1.23.0) on 2026-07-14; index covers linux/amd64 and linux/arm64 among eight platforms.

Official distroless static-debian12 workload image. Manifest-list digest resolved with skopeo inspect --raw (skopeo 1.23.0) on 2026-07-14; latest tag is mutable but the pinned digest is immutable; index covers linux/amd64,arm64,arm/v7,s390x,ppc64le.
